# Yash Darji — Freelance Backend Engineer & AI Developer

> Available for freelance and contract work. Building AI agents, RAG systems, and scalable APIs that ship to real users.

## About

Yash Darji is a backend engineer specialising in AI-powered systems and production-grade APIs. He has shipped large-scale crawlers, LLM-driven chatbots, itinerary planners, and semantic search systems used by real customers. He is currently open to freelance engagements, contract roles, and collaborative projects.

- Email: yash.darji.coder@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://in.linkedin.com/in/yash-darji
- GitHub: https://github.com/yshraj
- Portfolio: https://yash-builds-ai.netlify.app/

## Services

- AI Agent development (LangGraph, LangChain, OpenAI, Gemini)
- RAG pipeline design and implementation (Qdrant, vector search, semantic retrieval)
- Backend API development (Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Express)
- Web crawlers and data ingestion pipelines
- LLM integrations and chatbot systems
- Full-stack feature development

## Skills & Tools

Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Express, TypeScript, JavaScript, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, Supabase, LangGraph, LangChain, OpenAI API, Gemini, Qdrant, RAG, REST APIs, React, Next.js

## Selected Projects

- **DocuChat** — RAG-based document Q&A system with semantic search and source citations
- **VectorIngest** — Automated document ingestion pipeline for vector databases
- **JARVIS** — Personal AI assistant with tool use and memory
- **AI Live Chat** — LLM-powered customer support agent
- **Itinerary Agent** — LangGraph-orchestrated travel planner used in production at Milestone Inc.
- **OptiSense** — Sensor data analytics platform with AI anomaly detection
- **Real Estate Chatbot** — Property search assistant with natural language querying
- **Bank QA Bot** — Financial document Q&A with compliance-aware retrieval
- **SmartStock Scout** — AI stock sentiment analysis using HuggingFace and Yahoo Finance

## Experience

- **Backend Engineer — Milestone Inc. (2023–2026):** Led large-scale web crawlers (millions of URLs/week), built REST APIs for AI ingestion, deployed production chatbots and itinerary planners using LangGraph, FastAPI, and OpenAI. Achieved 40% infrastructure cost reduction.
- **SDE Intern — Milestone Inc. (2023):** Built FAQ Manager product with automated generation, reducing manual effort by 25%.
- **ML Intern — Canary Mail (2022):** Developed NLP models for phishing email and malicious link detection, improving email security by 30%.

## Education

B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering, Nirma University, Ahmedabad — 2019–2023 (CPI: 8.4/10)
